name: GroupMembershipCompleted

neutralConcepts: 'GroupMembershipCompleted' is a MACHINE literal string constant
gates on Branch A only: T101+T102+T103
PENDING state does NOT trigger GroupMembershipCompleted
Branch B (FeedSeeded) and Branch C (notifications) NOT in gate

ironRules.rule: 'GroupMembershipCompleted' must be declared as a MACHINE string literal constant — never dynamic.
Completion gate condition = Branch A: T101 (access provisioned) + T102 (record stored, ACTIVE). PENDING state does NOT trigger this gate.
Branch B (FeedSeeded) and Branch C (MemberWelcomeNotified) are NOT in the GroupMembershipCompleted gate condition.

keywords: group membership completed completion gate branch A machine literal PENDING not trigger
